name: Interpretation of Topographical Maps
description: Grid reference, scale, contours, physical features, drainage, settlement patterns.

name: Climate of India
description: Monsoon seasons, temperature and rainfall distribution, factors affecting India's climate.

name: Soils in India
description: Alluvial, Black, Red, and Laterite soils - formation, characteristics, distribution, soil erosion and conservation.

name: Natural Vegetation & Water Resources
description: Tropical evergreen, deciduous, thorny, littoral forest types; irrigation methods (canals, tube wells, tanks) and rainwater harvesting.

name: Minerals and Energy Resources
description: Iron ore, manganese, copper, bauxite; coal, petroleum, natural gas, hydel, solar, wind energy.

name: Agriculture in India
description: Food crops (rice, wheat), cash crops (sugar cane, cotton), tea, coffee - climate requirements and distribution.

name: Manufacturing Industries in India
description: Agro-based (sugar, textile) and mineral-based (iron & steel, petrochemical) industries.

name: Transport & Waste Management
description: Roadways, Railways, Airways, Waterways advantages; types of waste, impact, safe disposal, and recycling.
